creator: aehlig@linta.de
text:
Created attachment 185169
patch for deve/bazel to fix build on i386

Completed the patch, to also fix the incorrect call to nanosleep. With that patch I could successfully build a working bazel on i386 (FreeBSD 11). The nanosleep patch is also upstreamed, see 
https://bazel-review.googlesource.com/c/14991
